testcases.title: Parse and print JSON round trip

testcases.description: Runs an iperf3 zero-copy loopback transfer and verifies JSON sender byte and throughput totals.

testcases.description: Runs an iperf3 loopback test with omitted warmup time and verifies JSON interval omission markers.
